summary: Completed testing of Iteration 18 features: Hallazgos table improvements (Brecha column expansion, Dominio column) and Vulnerabilidades column selector additions (Dominio, Control Asociado). All 8 backend tests passed. All 5 requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Chart console warnings about width/height being -1 (non-blocking, cosmetic)

passed_tests: Backend: Vulnerability enrichment with control_id works correctly
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria returns paginated data (184 items)
Backend: Hallazgos enrichment logic present (no hallazgos have control_id assigned)
Backend: GET /api/config/dominios returns list of dominios
Backend: GET /api/config/controles returns list of controles
UI: Hallazgos table has Dominio column header visible
UI: Hallazgos table has Brecha column header visible (with min-w-[300px])
UI: Hallazgos form Dominio dropdown shows 'N/A' option
UI: Hallazgos form Dominio dropdown does NOT show 'Todos los dominios'
UI: Vulnerabilidades column selector includes 'Dominio' option
UI: Vulnerabilidades column selector includes 'Control Asociado' option
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested UI improvements for Hallazgos and Vulnerabilidades pages. Key findings: (1) Hallazgos table now has Dominio column visible and Brecha column with min-w-[300px] and line-clamp-2 for better readability. (2) Hallazgos form Dominio dropdown shows 'N/A' instead of 'Todos los dominios'. (3) Vulnerabilidades column selector now includes 'Dominio' and 'Control Asociado' options. (4) Backend enriches vulnerabilidades with nombre_dominio and codigo_control when control_id is set. (5) Existing hallazgos don't have control_id assigned, so enrichment fields are not populated for them. (6) Existing vulnerabilidades don't have control_id assigned either.

hallazgos_table: Brecha column has min-w-[300px] for expanded width
Brecha column uses line-clamp-2 with title for hover text
Dominio column visible in table header
Dominio column shows nombre_dominio or '—' when not set
hallazgos_form: Dominio dropdown shows 'N/A' as first option
vulnerabilidades_columns: Column selector includes 'Control Asociado' option (id: control_asociado)
Both columns are not visible by default (default: false in ALL_COLUMNS)
backend_enrichment: Enrichment works when control_id is set on vulnerability
